member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.InvoicingStrategy
member.summary: Define the Invoice strategy.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.InvoicingStrategy.SingleInvoiceTable
member.summary: Single invoice for all Food Banks.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.InvoicingStrategy.MultipleTablesPerFoodBank
member.summary: Multiple invoice tables per food bank.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.PaymentStrategy
member.summary: Payment strategy for the tenant.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.PaymentStrategy.SharedPaymentProcessor
member.summary: Payments are shared for each food bank.

member.name: F:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Sas.Model.Strategy.PaymentStrategy.IndividualPaymentProcessorPerFoodBank
member.summary: Each food bank has it own configuration for the payment system.

member.summary: Gets or sets the default payment strategy.
